executives.name: Thomas Leppert
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of The Turner Corporation. Former Mayor of Dallas.

executives.name: William Plummer
executives.background: William B. Plummer has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since December 2008. He previously held senior finance roles at Dow Jones & Company and Alcoa.
